instructions: - ALWAYS read ai_docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md before implementing any UI
- ALWAYS read ai_docs/COMPONENT_CATALOG.md and use existing components
- NEVER hardcode font sizes — use AppTypography.xxx with .sp
- NEVER use left/right — use start/end for RTL
- Presentation layer must NOT import from data layer

hooks.command: echo '🚀 Flutter Session' && echo '📱 '$(flutter --version 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -d' ' -f1-4) && echo '' && echo '📂 Modified:' && git status -s 2>/dev/null | head -10 && echo '' && echo '📝 Recent:' && git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '⚠️  TODOs:' $(grep -rn 'TODO' lib/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') 'in lib/' && echo '🐛 FIXMEs:' $(grep -rn 'FIXME' lib/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') 'in lib/'

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|flutter clean|DROP|--force|truncate'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "⛔ Destructive command blocked. Ask the user first."}'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | { read cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push|git rebase'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "⛔ Git push/rebase blocked. Let the user do this manually."}'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read file; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.g\.dart$|\.freezed\.dart$|\.mocks\.dart$'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "⛔ Cannot edit generated file. Edit the source and run build_runner instead."}'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read file; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE 'pubspec\.lock$|Podfile\.lock$|\.flutter-plugins$'; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "⛔ Cannot edit lock files directly. Modify pubspec.yaml and run pub get."}'; fi; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read file; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.dart$'; then dart format "$file" 2>/dev/null && echo '✅ Formatted: '$file; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read file; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.dart$'; then result=$(dart analyze "$file" 2>&1); errors=$(echo "$result" | grep -c 'error •' || true); warnings=$(echo "$result" | grep -c 'warning •' || true); if [ "$errors" -gt 0 ]; then echo "🔴 $errors errors in $file"; echo "$result" | grep 'error •' | head -3; elif [ "$warnings" -gt 0 ]; then echo "🟡 $warnings warnings in $file"; fi; fi; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read file; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '_test\.dart$'; then echo '🧪 Running: '$file; flutter test "$file" 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read file; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q 'pubspec.yaml$'; then echo '📦 pubspec changed — running pub get...'; flutter pub get 2>&1 | tail -3; fi; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read file; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE 'Podfile$'; then echo '🍎 Podfile changed — run: cd ios && pod install'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read file; if [ -n "$file" ] && grep -q 'part.*\.freezed\.dart\|part.*\.g\.dart' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo '⚙️  Has code-gen parts — run: dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs'; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read file; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.dart$'; then lines=$(wc -l < "$file" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' '); if [ "$lines" -gt 300 ]; then echo "⚠️  $file is $lines lines — consider decomposing"; fi; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read file; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.dart$' && echo "$file" | grep -q '/presentation/'; then if grep -q 'import.*\/data\/' "$file" 2>/dev/null; then echo '🏗️  Architecture violation: presentation layer importing from data layer'; fi; fi; }

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read file; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '(en|ar)\.json$'; then python3 -c "import json,sys; en=json.load(open('assets/translations/en.json')); ar=json.load(open('assets/translations/ar.json')); missing_ar=[k for k in en if k not in ar]; missing_en=[k for k in ar if k not in en]; print('🌍 Translation sync:'); print(f'  Missing in ar.json: {len(missing_ar)}') if missing_ar else None; print(f'  Missing in en.json: {len(missing_en)}') if missing_en else None; print('  ✅ In sync') if not missing_ar and not missing_en else None" 2>/dev/null; fi; }

echo '🔍 Final checks...' && echo '' && echo '--- Analyzer ---' && dart analyze lib/ 2>&1 | tail -5 && echo '' && echo '--- Unused imports ---' && dart analyze lib/ 2>&1 | grep 'unused_import' | wc -l | xargs -I{} echo '{} unused imports found' && echo '' && echo '--- File sizes ---' && find lib/ -name '*.dart' -exec wc -l {} + 2>/dev/null | sort -rn | head -5 | awk '{printf "  %s lines: %s\n", $1, $2}'
mkdir -p ~/.claude/logs && jq -r '.message // empty' | { read msg; if [ -n "$msg" ]; then echo "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S') | $msg" >> ~/.claude/logs/flutter-session.log; fi; }
